title: purple CPVP Pack 16x
description: A purple CPVP pack 16x for better looks
body:
A Texture Pack made for CPVP and revamps all the pvp items in a purple color and gives them a brand new look the Pack contains Following things:
 
> Crossbow
> Enchant Glint
> Respawn anchor
> Arrows
> Totems
> Ender Pearls
> shield
> HUD
> Dark GUI
> Dark Tools & Weaopns
> Bottle o Enchanting
> Tipped arrows 
> Spalsh Potions
> 3D Mace
> Rockets
> obsidian
> Low Fire
> End Crystal Entity
> Totem Pop Particles
> Black Glowstone Dust
> No Explostion Particles
> Low Shield
> Some new Particles
> No Explosion Sounds
